description_long: This is a cylindrical cup with a faceted exterior, giving it a polygonal appearance. The cup is predominantly white with a matte finish, and features a distinctive black starburst pattern on the top surface. On one side, there is a bold, stylized face motif with X-shaped eyes and a curved smile, reminiscent of pop culture iconography. The cup does not have a handle or lid, and its interior is not visible but is likely hollow for holding liquids. The overall design is playful and modern, making it suitable for urban environments or themed events.
description: A white, faceted cylindrical cup with a black starburst top and a stylized face motif featuring X eyes and a smile. The design is playful and modern, lacking a handle or lid.
description_view_0: Front view shows the plain faceted white surface with the black starburst pattern on top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the edge of the face motif beginning to appear on the right side.
description_view_2: This view displays the full stylized face with X eyes and a smile, along with the starburst top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the end of the face motif and the faceted white surface.
